'''pafapa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:readaptability|readaptability]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-f-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:readaptability|readaptability]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| pafapa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæfæpæth|pæfæpæth]] || [[word:pæfæpæj|pæfæpæj]] || [[word:pæfæpæsh|pæfæpæsh]] || [[word:pæfæpæ|pæfæpæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:pafafapath|pafafapath]] || [[word:pafafapaj|pafafapaj]] || [[word:pafafapash|pafafapash]] || [[word:pafafapa|pafafapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:pafapath|pafapath]] || [[word:pafapaj|pafapaj]] || [[word:pafapash|pafapash]] || [[word:pafapa|pafapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:pafafpath|pafafpath]] || [[word:pafafpaj|pafafpaj]] || [[word:pafafpash|pafafpash]] || [[word:pafafpaf|pafafpaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pafapatha|pafapatha]] || [[word:pafapaja|pafapaja]] || [[word:pafapasha|pafapasha]] || [[word:pafapaka|pafapaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pafapath|pafapath]] || [[word:pafapaj|pafapaj]] || [[word:pafapash|pafapash]] || [[word:pafapa|pafapa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pafapathal|pafapathal]] || [[word:pafapajal|pafapajal]] || [[word:pafapashal|pafapashal]] || [[word:pafapakal|pafapakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pafapathatha|pafapathatha]] || [[word:pafapajaja|pafapajaja]] || [[word:pafapashasha|pafapashasha]] || [[word:pafapaka|pafapaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pafapathan|pafapathan]] || [[word:pafapajan|pafapajan]] || [[word:pafapashan|pafapashan]] || [[word:pafapakan|pafapakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pafapathaoro|pafapathaoro]] || [[word:pafapajaoro|pafapajaoro]] || [[word:pafapashaoro|pafapashaoro]] || [[word:pafapakaoro|pafapakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
